name: Courage To Change Group
notes: The Monday noon First Things First open meeting at camel club as been replaced. July 12th effective date for Courage To Change AA Group. The format is open discussion. Starts at noon to 1 pm. The group started with 10 home group members and plans to follow the AA service structure snd will contact Intergroup and provide an elected intergroup group representative in the near future. Please contact Doug J (919 630 8855) for any questions, suggestions, clarifications, or concerns. We appreciate an opportunity to be of service and an active part of the community and local service structure.

name: Tuesday Thursday Nooners
notes:
We invite you to our regular closed discussion meeting.

In support of A.A.’s singleness of purpose, attendance at closed meetings is limited to persons who have a desire to stop drinking. If you think you have a problem with alcohol, you are welcome to attend this meeting. We ask that when discussing our problems, we confine ourselves to those problems as they relate to alcoholism.

name: Tuesday Thursday Nooners
notes:
We invite you to our regular closed discussion meeting.

In support of A.A.’s singleness of purpose, attendance at closed meetings is limited to persons who have a desire to stop drinking. If you think you have a problem with alcohol, you are welcome to attend this meeting. We ask that when discussing our problems, we confine ourselves to those problems as they relate to alcoholism.

We discuss a step each week except the last Thursday of the month we discuss the month’s tradition
